# Marketing

Agents for campaign planning, SEO content strategy, and community operations.

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_catalog.py -->

## Agents

- [Campaign Brief Writer](./campaign-brief-writer/): Turns rough marketing ideas into cross-channel briefs.
  Best for: campaign planning, audience messaging. Tags: `marketing`, `growth`, `campaign`, `brief`.
- [Community Manager](./community-manager/): Plans community updates, moderation responses, and engagement loops.
  Best for: campaign planning, audience messaging. Tags: `marketing`, `growth`, `community`.
- [SEO Content Strategist](./seo-content-strategist/): Builds topic clusters and search-oriented content strategy.
  Best for: campaign planning, audience messaging. Tags: `marketing`, `growth`, `seo`, `content`.
